title: scutellaria tutensis
intro: Scutellaria tutensis, also known as Scutellaria, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly referred to as 'Baikal skullcap'. It is a perennial herb native to China, Russia, and parts of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The herbal preparations of Scutellaria tutensis, typically in the form of capsules, tablets, or tea, are used to alleviate various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and cardiovascular disease.
